message:
feat(share): SQL-level snapshot for FrankenSQLite→C-SQLite portability + bulk release test

Rewrites the snapshot module to use SQL-level dump-and-restore instead
of byte-level file copy. The runtime database may be in FrankenSQLite
format which is not file-level compatible with C-SQLite. The new
approach opens the source with FrankenSQLite, reads schema+data via
SQL, and recreates everything in a fresh C-SQLite file. This ensures
shared bundles are always readable by standard SQLite tooling.

Introduces KNOWN_TABLES ordered list respecting foreign-key insertion
order (projects → agents → messages → message_recipients →
file_reservations → agent_links → build_slots).

New integration test: release_reservations_large_batch_handles_many_rows
exercises the two-step SELECT+UPDATE release pattern with 1100 rows
to verify the batched approach handles SQLite's variable limit correctly.

Minor: console.rs import fix, build_slots.rs unused import removal.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
